From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Namibian football club

Football club

Bucks Buccaneers FC

**Bucks Buccaneers Football Club** is a [Namibian football](/wiki/Football_in_Namibia "Football in Namibia") club based in [Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"). Until January 2025 the club have had the name  **Civics Football Club**. Bucks Buccaneers FC play in the highest division of Namibian football, the [Namibia Premier League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_League "Namibia Premier League"). The club has its home in [Khomasdal](/wiki/Khomasdal "Khomasdal"), in the north of the Namibian capital Windhoek.

They play their home games at [Sam Nujoma Stadium](/wiki/Sam_Nujoma_Stadium "Sam Nujoma Stadium") in [Katutura](/wiki/Katutura "Katutura"), Windhoek.

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bucks_Buccaneers_FC&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

FC Civics were founded by a group of young students in 1983, who initially named the team after a local street – *Bethlehem Boys*. The club later became the *Mighty Civilians* before being recast again as *Civics*. Even today, the bulk of the squad comes either from Khomasdal or the neighbouring township of Katutura.

The club rose from a useful street team to Namibia's top league with the help of Helmut Scharnowski, from the northern German city of [Flensburg](/wiki/Flensburg "Flensburg").[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]

From 2000 until 2007, the club was also known as Buschschule Civics.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

In January 2025, it was announced that the club had been sold to a new ownership group and official rebranded to Bucks Buccaneers FC.[[2]](#cite_note-Bucks_Buccaneers-2)

## Achievements

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bucks_Buccaneers_FC&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Achievements")]

* **[Namibia Premier League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_League "Namibia Premier League"): 3**

:   :   2005, 2006, 2007

* **[NFA-Cup](/wiki/NFA-Cup "NFA-Cup"): 3**

:   :   2003, 2008, 2021[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Performance in CAF competitions

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bucks_Buccaneers_FC&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Performance in CAF competitions")]

* **[CAF Champions League](/wiki/CAF_Champions_League "CAF Champions League"): 3 appearances**

:   :   [2004](/wiki/CAF_Champions_League_2004 "CAF Champions League 2004") – First Round
    :   [2006](/wiki/CAF_Champions_League_2006 "CAF Champions League 2006") – Second Round
    :   [2007](/wiki/CAF_Champions_League_2007 "CAF Champions League 2007") – First Round
